chosen_action.title: Block duplicate repo-conversion proof-asset churn inside the current review window

why_this_action.summary: The highest-leverage executable action was a runtime repair: the selector could still pick repo_conversion_proof_asset even after a proof asset had already shipped in the same review window, which creates fake progress instead of moving to truthful hold/follow-through or architecture repair behavior.
shared_findings_used: marketing_2026-05-28_021505_repo_conversion_proof_asset.json: a proof asset already shipped in the current window
marketing_2026-05-28_021557_repo_conversion_proof_asset.json: duplicate same-window proof-asset churn already happened
marketing_2026-05-28_stackoverflow_manual_delivery.json: StackOverflow slot was already burned in this review window
marketing_2026-05-28_measurement_hold_execution.json: the hold flow resurfaced stale packet truth instead of advancing to a distinct executable lane
drafts/post_hold_distribution_reentry_latest.md: once the hold clears with an empty board, the system should repair architecture instead of emitting another idle hold

result.summary: Patched the distribution lane selector to block reselecting repo_conversion_proof_asset when a recent proof asset already shipped, added a regression test for the exact duplicate-churn shape, and verified the affected selector paths with focused unittests.
